summary_en: 1,250,000 shares (2.08% of S/O) | ¥500M upper limit | market purchase on TSE Growth Market | May 18 – Aug 31, 2026 | intended for M&A consideration to align target management incentives with group value creation
title_en: Notice of Resolution on Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief:
AnyMind Group's board resolved on May 14, 2026 to acquire treasury shares under Article 459(1) of the Companies Act. The company will acquire up to 1,250,000 ordinary shares (2.08% of outstanding shares, excluding treasury stock) with a total budget ceiling of ¥500 million via open market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Growth Market between May 18 and August 31, 2026.

The stated rationale is to enhance shareholder returns and capital efficiency in light of continuous profit growth, current share valuation, and business outlook. The company intends to deploy acquired shares as partial consideration in future M&A transactions, with the goal of providing target company management with sustained ownership stakes and growth incentives to maximize group enterprise value.
